temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) A man in a red shirt is violently thrown through a temple-like setting, surrounded by burning incense sticks and white paper flowers. He is then engulfed in a swirling, fiery explosion that moves through a narrow, dark corridor, sending debris flying. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a chaotic and violent conflict, immediately throwing the protagonist into a dangerous and destructive situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, percussive, and chaotic music with heavy drums and distorted sounds. The sound of a loud explosion and crackling fire dominates the audio.)
(00:06-00:12) The fiery explosion continues to swirl and expand as it moves down the dark, narrow corridor. The camera follows the fiery mass, revealing more of the dimly lit, traditional-looking building with wooden structures and a sign with a red character. (Storyline: The sequence continues to build on the initial violence, showing the destructive power of the force that has just assaulted the character.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The chaotic, percussive music continues, accompanied by the intense sound of roaring fire and explosions.)
